overview: ZoomCart BD is a Bangladeshi dropshipping reseller platform where anyone can sign up for free, get an affiliate link, share products on Facebook and WhatsApp, and earn 80–150 BDT commission per sale. Weekly payments via bKash/Nagad. Includes a product catalog, reseller dashboard, and admin panel.
features: Landing page with hero, earnings showcase, and 4-step how-it-works
Product catalog with category filtering (Turbo Fan, Kitchen Tools, Health & Beauty, Gadgets)
Reseller dashboard with affiliate link copy tool and earnings summary
Admin panel for product management (with image uploads) and order tracking
Role-based access: admin vs. reseller via Internet Identity login
Mobile-first design with bilingual English + Bangla content
Trust badges: Fast Delivery, Weekly Payment, 100% Free Registration
